name: EdwBhiMbrCobBaseSplitP2Ld

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT A.BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, A.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, A.MBR_ID, A.CONSIS_MBR_ID, A.TRACEABILITY_FLD, A.MBR_DOB, A.MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, A.MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, A.MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, A.MBR_GNDR, A.MBR_CONFITY_CD, A.ACCT, A.GRP_ID, A.SUBGRP_ID, A.COV_BEG_DT, A.COV_END_DT, A.MBR_RELSHP, A.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, A.SUB_ID, A.ENR_ELIG_STTUS, A.MBR_MED_COB_CD, A.MBR_PDX_COB_CD, A.DEDCT_CAT, A.MHCD_ENR_BNF, A.PDX_BNF_IN, A.MHCD_BNF_IN, A.MED_BNF_IN, A.HOSP_BNF_IN, A.BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, A.BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, A.PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, A.PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, A.PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, A.PDX_BNF_TIERS, A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, A.PROD_SK, A.PROD_SH_NM, B.END_EFF_DT_SK, B.END_TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_ENR A JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT B ON A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AND A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK = B.MBR_EFF_DT_SK AND A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK = B.MBR_TERM_DT_SK WHERE B.END_EFF_DT_SK <> 'NULL'), cte2 AS (SELECT CASE WHEN cte1.END_EFF_DT_SK IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS svEndEff, cte1.* FROM cte1), cte3 AS (SELECT cte2.BHI_HOME_PLN_ID AS BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, cte2.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID AS HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, cte2.MBR_ID AS MBR_ID, cte2.CONSIS_MBR_ID AS CONSIS_MBR_ID, cte2.TRACEABILITY_FLD AS TRACEABILITY_FLD, cte2.MBR_DOB AS MBR_DOB, cte2.MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD AS MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, cte2.MBR_S_CUR_CTRY AS MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, cte2.MBR_S_CUR_CNTY AS MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, cte2.MBR_GNDR AS MBR_GNDR, cte2.MBR_CONFITY_CD AS MBR_CONFITY_CD, cte2.ACCT AS ACCT, cte2.GRP_ID AS GRP_ID, cte2.SUBGRP_ID AS SUBGRP_ID, CASE WHEN cte2.svEndEff = 'Y' THEN dbo.trim_custom(cte2.END_EFF_DT_SK, '-', 'A') ELSE cte2.COV_BEG_DT END AS COV_BEG_DT, CASE WHEN cte2.svEndEff = 'Y' THEN dbo.trim_custom(cte2.END_TERM_DT_SK, '-', 'A') ELSE cte2.COV_END_DT END AS COV_END_DT, cte2.MBR_RELSHP AS MBR_RELSHP, cte2.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB AS HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, cte2.SUB_ID AS SUB_ID, cte2.ENR_ELIG_STTUS AS ENR_ELIG_STTUS, CASE WHEN cte2.svEndEff = 'Y' THEN 'P' ELSE cte2.MBR_MED_COB_CD END AS MBR_MED_COB_CD, CASE WHEN cte2.svEndEff = 'Y' THEN 'P' ELSE cte2.MBR_PDX_COB_CD END AS MBR_PDX_COB_CD, cte2.DEDCT_CAT AS DEDCT_CAT, cte2.MHCD_ENR_BNF AS MHCD_ENR_BNF, cte2.PDX_BNF_IN AS PDX_BNF_IN, cte2.MHCD_BNF_IN AS MHCD_BNF_IN, cte2.MED_BNF_IN AS MED_BNF_IN, cte2.HOSP_BNF_IN AS HOSP_BNF_IN, cte2.BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY AS BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, cte2.BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF AS BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, cte2.PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY AS PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, cte2.PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF AS PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, cte2.PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN AS PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, cte2.PDX_BNF_TIERS AS PDX_BNF_TIERS, cte2.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY, CASE WHEN cte2.svEndEff = 'Y' THEN cte2.END_EFF_DT_SK ELSE cte2.MBR_EFF_DT_SK END AS MBR_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN cte2.svEndEff = 'Y' THEN cte2.END_TERM_DT_SK ELSE cte2.MBR_TERM_DT_SK END AS MBR_TERM_DT_SK, 'I' AS UPDT_IN, cte2.PROD_SK AS PROD_SK, cte2.PROD_SH_NM AS PROD_SH_NM FROM cte2 ) SELECT * FROM cte3

JOB NAME: EdwBhiMbrCobBaseSplitP2Ld


DESCRIPTION:  Inner join and load base split table for Cob type cd = COM


CALLED BY:  

HASH FILES:

Annotations:
Inner Join W_BHI_MBR_ENR to W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT to load W_BHI_MBR_ENR_SPLT and Assign 'P' to MBR_MED_COB_CD and MBR_PDX_COB_CD
